content: We will standardize the brand voice as helpful, pragmatic, and friendly across all channels.
Chunking knowledge into 400–800 tokens leads to more precise retrieval and fewer hallucinations.
The Acme Clean line targets urban millennials seeking effective, eco-friendly home care solutions.
When addressing UK audiences, prefer British spelling and metric units.
Customers report confusion between the ‘Multi-Surface’ and ‘Kitchen’ sprays; simplified naming could reduce returns.
Acme Clean bottles are made from 100% post-consumer recycled plastic and are curbside recyclable.
